mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ${table} AS t1 INNER JOIN ${tables} AS t2 ON t1.kind = t2.kind_id WHERE ( t2.kind_name = '${where}' ) ORDER BY t1.create_time DESC LIMIT ${action}, ${count}

SELECT count(fd_id) FROM ${table} AS t1
where ${where}

SELECT ${varcher} FROM ${table} AS t1
where fd_id ='${fd_id}'
select table_name from information_schema.tables where table_schema='${msql}'
